results.title: The Green Room
results.overview: A widower maintains a memorial room filled with his late wife's belongings. When fire destroys it, he transforms a chapel into a new shrine to preserve her memory.

results.title: Green Room
results.overview: A punk rock band is forced to fight for survival after witnessing an act of violence at a skinhead bar.

results.title: Green Room
results.overview: A rare opportunity for the parallels of queer youth and digital society to collide.

results.title: Little Green Room
results.overview: A reclusive man refusing to mourn a personal tragedy is confronted by the depths of his mind.

results.title: Green Room: Thehrav
results.overview: Two actors—one in his 20s, one in his 50s—rehearse their upcoming scene in a major motion picture. Before long, they begin to argue about a conflict of interests

results.title: The Green Room
results.overview: Seth and Tommy are student vloggers at a film college. All is going well for them, except for their tutor Arthur refusing to let any students into the college green room. Tommy thinks nothing of it, but Seth suspects Arthur of keeping some type of secret from them, and ropes Tommy into an unorthodox investigation of the green room, which results in them discovering something truly horrifying...

results.title: The Green Room
results.overview: When a whimsical family moves to their grandparents for a time, the young siblings become fascinated with the magic in the Green Room.

results.title: The Ghosts of the Green Room
results.overview: According to the story of JB Prestley "Jenny Villiers." Actors of the London Theater gathered in the Green Room of Barton Spa, a kind of theater museum. The playwright Martin Civerell expresses his doubts that the theater is able to regain its former charm. Left alone in the Green Room, Civerell sees the actors of the last century and becomes a witness to the drama that happened here a hundred years ago...

results.title: Inland Empire
results.overview: When actress Nikki Grace gets the lead role in a cursed film, her world becomes more and more surreal, blending realities and ideas of infidelity, reincarnation, and supernatural forces.

results.title: Soylent Green
results.overview: In the year 2022, overcrowding, pollution,  and resource depletion have reduced society’s leaders to finding food for the teeming masses. The answer is Soylent Green.
